steps.title: Identify the confirmatory relationship
steps.content:
The first sentence claims an upward urbanization trend was seen “throughout that part of the continent.” The second sentence then provides specific regional data showing Southeast Asian urban population rose from 47.2% to 50%.

The transition word must show how this regional evidence confirms the broad claim.

steps.title: Match the confirming word
steps.content:
”Indeed” signals confirmation—it introduces evidence supporting what was just stated.

The other three choices suggest something different: “In reality” implies correction, “Later” implies a different time period, and “Nevertheless” signals contrast.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
